props.open: Drawer visibility in overlay mode (use `v-model:open`); closes on outside click.
props.permanent: Renders in place as part of the layout instead of a fixed overlay.
props.reduce: Collapses the drawer to a 50px Discord-style icon rail.
props.hoverExpand: Expands the reduced rail while hovered.
props.right: Docks the drawer to the right edge.
props.width: Drawer width (px or any CSS size).

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when an item is activated.
events.update:open: Emitted when the overlay drawer opens or closes.

slots.header: Content below the logo (e.g. a user card).
